calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Jonathan Herschel Bornstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff HOI DEA, sworn and examined,
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant CHUAN HUA WANG,
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing
Court returned exhibit to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 158 Stonecrest Drive (Garage Unit), San Francisco, California 94132, San Francisco.
Damages $0
Holdover damages $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $477.50
For a Total Judgment of $477.50

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge Pro Tem: Anne Wong, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Hoi Dea is present.
Attorney J.H. Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendants Chuan Hua Wang is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of December 19, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
